message:
Fix channel instruction matching — store and match by both ID and name

Channel instructions were silently ignored because they were stored
with channel IDs but looked up by channel names. Now:

- ChannelInstruction stores optional channelId and channelName
- set_channel_instruction accepts both channel_id and channel_name params
- Lookup matches on either field (case-insensitive)
- Legacy format (single `channel` field) auto-migrates on read
- Orchestrator passes both ID and name for reliable matching

Fixes the channel-specific instructions bug discovered in PRI-630.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
